allow: PowerShell($p = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1\).OwningProcess; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; "Detenido proceso $p en puerto 5000" } else { "Puerto 5000 ya libre" })

PowerShell($out = @\(\); foreach \($c in @\('python','python3','py'\)\) { try { $v = & $c --version 2>&1; $out += "$c -> $v" } catch { $out += "$c -> NO" } }; $out += "pip:"; try { $out += \(python -m pip --version 2>&1\) } catch { $out += "pip NO" }; $out -join "`n")
